title: Retenzy.pdf
summaries:
* Retenzy is an all-in-one customer retention and loyalty platform for Shopify e-commerce brands, founded in 2023 and headquartered in Pune, India.
* The software combines customer rewards, referral structures, and product reviews to boost customer lifetime value (LTV).
* Merchants can construct points-based economies, tier-based VIP tracks, and custom milestones.
* The platform automates the collection of text, photo, and video reviews via scheduled emails or SMS.
* Verified reviews can be automatically synced with Google Shopping to generate SEO-rich snippets.
* Businesses can create custom referral networks to turn existing customers into brand advocates.

* Integrates with Google Shopping and generates SEO-rich snippets.
* Enables businesses to create custom referral networks.
* Supports membership tiers offering exclusive perks like early access, free shipping, or special discounts.
* Provides built-in email marketing flows, including welcome emails, shipping updates, abandoned cart reminders, and post-purchase follow-ups.
* Retenzy features over 15 pre-built storefront widgets to display loyalty incentives and review sections without custom development.
